hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) npx --yes tsc --noEmit --pretty "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20 || true;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in package-lock.json|yarn.lock|pnpm-lock.yaml|bun.lockb) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lockfiles directly. Use npm install / yarn add / pnpm add instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
